categories.title: FORMULA FOR SUCCESS
categories.theme: Facts about Formula 1 racing history — answer is the DRIVER, TEAM, or CIRCUIT named

clues.clue: This seven-time world champion is the most decorated driver in Formula 1 history.
Jenson Button claimed his first and only Formula One World Drivers' Championship in this year.
The future seven-time champion made his Formula One debut at the 1991 Belgian Grand Prix with this team.
He won the 1994 San Marino Grand Prix, the very race overshadowed by the fatal crash of Ayrton Senna.
This German circuit hosted its last Formula 1 race in 1976, the year Niki Lauda suffered his near-fatal crash there.

finals.title: RACING FIRSTS
finals.clue: In 1977, this pioneering driver shattered a gender barrier by becoming the first woman to compete in the Indianapolis 500.
